textByHash.08b139f89f82c99fc30d76a75fb1cb50883cb46d: Hello! Do you have any questions for me?
textByHash.f45441d2c5ce845cfcd2a966c985dbcffab32ed5: All sorts of things! I can't recount all of the information for you, but I can give you the basics though.
textByHash.c1a8749582d5122b0989648ef2a0084568d7eed8: During this League, you are initially restricted to the Kingdom of Misthalin. However, as you progress, you'll be able to unlock new areas of your choosing.
textByHash.c2e9ae37cc42dea17c9816564a4a9eacba9abd3d: Be warned though - you won't be able to unlock every area, so choose wisely.
textByHash.4ea75a810a6025ffe3899b32b4fed91a4464692f: Now, for the entire League, you must participate as an Iron Man. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.
textByHash.4a5f39185cba4da3c7f7e1efa357c8b643cda353: And that's not all. Training skills during the League will grant you substantially more experience than you'd normally expect!
textByHash.3f414f57de7e8fe84a2d3247bc84f4674dc115f5: Finally, some quests have been completed for you automatically. Further quests will be completed as you unlock the relevant areas.
textByHash.c2934173acd287d38d8ddf381dbb54b4a4134b34: I think that covers the basics. Would you like to see some more in-depth information?
textByHash.3e811370fb3bc4339bb64bc9abde765bf33c838b: Fair enough. Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.405c0407c9d0e01b0dea80206c590718d1908573: In every League, there are a number of tasks for you to complete. Each task has a level of difficulty: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite and Master.
textByHash.f2be30dfb3eb95c3e72bcf4af7c45c977d44c718: Completing tasks allows you to access new areas. The more tasks completed, the more areas available to unlock.
textByHash.2b1068f5718bcae60841f194a57c395e2f4fa4e0: Not only that, completing tasks also earns you League Points. The number of points earned is dependent on the difficulty of the task.
textByHash.177b481f740a208004778d273776cb9e98e9475e: Once you have achieved a certain amount of League Points you can unlock a new Relic! These are powerful artefacts to help you in the League.
textByHash.44f066c916825908abd93731a149a30a9599dd7e: League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHash.fb52e305b4c0a7061d49d311f0de870b3dcc39f8: More than you'll ever be able to complete, most likely. With so many to choose from, it's up to you which ones you go for.
textByHash.d4ea1b8b8fa60e346e5fc723d0c218aa4f47b322: Not a problem. Now, would you like to take a look at the tasks for this League?
textByHash.e960dd5d4791df8ef7f5e75a758e715a7a64711c: In this League, you are initially locked to the Kingdom of Misthalin and the island of Karamja. However, as you progress, you can unlock more areas.
textByHash.f910401036854e4af03da30672987c2e030dbbfc: There are nine different areas in total. However, you can only unlock a maximum of five, including Misthalin and Karamja, so choose wisely.
textByHash.63fab3227c0b9b27785f9f26eef3657be1969c1a: The first two area unlocks are given to everyone. However, the other three unlocks are unavailable to begin with.
textByHash.d56bba85761253ac2f7ad1ce7a1c3ad7fd9aaf61: You can access these additional area unlocks by completing tasks. The more tasks you've completed, the more areas you can unlock.
textByHash.f2f7432d0403c30948a70df31cb7885632f683e2: Would you like to take a look at the available areas now?
textByHash.70717b8b20e1fa7e6eb1e1c5783ab8e64fdc2b0e: Relics, or Trailblazer Relics to give them their full name, are powerful artefacts that grant unique abilities for the entire League!
textByHash.19b88201573dd4a1b8063ebd6c6aaaa0177cb118: There are eighteen separate Relics, split across six different tiers. You can only have one Relic from each tier though.
textByHash.70bdc4d6813073c23a3d1c69a606755617df5a92: The first Relic tier is available to everyone. However, the higher tiers are locked to begin with.
textByHash.19a36e4312e9dea91bc91d83574dfc6f371ead05: You can unlock these higher tiers by earning League Points. League Points are earned by completing tasks.
textByHash.aa140e7299cb588f01197680cec5174ab850260c: Be warned, you'll need to choose carefully when picking a Relic. Once you have selected a Relic, your choice can't be changed for the rest of the League.
textByHash.8f47124c4c28a690e66db653b6b97f2207a4c33e: Anyway, it looks like you have a Relic available for selection right now! Would you like to take a look?
textByHash.3c939dbd1b9e22b6a13fe6a3d0d50fa00dbfe8b3: As well as letting you unlock new areas, completing tasks in the League will earn you League Points. The more League Points you have, the more Trailblazer Relic tiers you have available.
textByHash.832b562bda99d6b69b2978da3dc0b460a6ba0cb2: However, alongside allowing you to unlock Trailblazer Relics, League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHash.ceb39109360b3755ea34f3ccbcd8776a6551d89d: All sorts of things! There's some new furniture for your house, an alternate animation for your Home Teleport spell and some new stylish outfits, just to name a few.
textByHash.18152386f8976d6494e8da6ad06648bbb4b7533b: Most of the rewards can be traded with others, so if you want, you can earn some money by selling them on. Of course, you might prefer to keep them for yourself instead.
textByHash.d955dde876c0ecffb9bb8ad32f7b99396fb5c705: One thing to be aware of is that the Trailblazer rewards won't be available until the League has ended. You can still buy rewards from previous Leagues though.
textByHash.d4fcc666ab9c21c3df808b1184fdd28b41cd9f6a: Now, alongside the rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop, there's also League Ranks.
textByHash.6d595375a7d52b2b84e7b24bfe3524eb909e0747: At the end of the League, you will be given a League Rank. This is based upon the number of League Points you have earned compared to the other participants.
textByHash.251c5b52a4f265972f8afb047c2f78815e8d8c5b: Anyone who earns at least 100 League Points will be eligible for the Bronze rank. The top 80% of participants get the Iron rank. The top 60% get Steel.
textByHash.d9f1fb191f6079e04c61b0833b767ab6ebbce280: The top 40% get Mithril. The top 20% get Adamant. The top 5% get Rune. The best participants, those who make it to the top 1%, get the Dragon rank!
textByHash.a91f3d5257a3e2a5ba0b6a37dbd6cc4a10a48548: When the League ends, your rank will determine what trophy you get. These trophies symbolise your performance in the League.
textByHash.806817cd6313ae62da7d59fe94c055ac42a0bdcd: That's right. Trophies are items that are given to you after the League. You can use them to show off your League Rank!
textByHash.c150d545421c067b797376fd30f6f4070b36ca87: Connected to League Ranks are the League to League rewards. These are unlocked in the next League based upon the League Rank you earn in this one!
textByHash.b175c798a735938aa3aa18f52783ed67a9986b66: League Starter Outfits and League Icons are some of things you can unlock for the next League. Also, any pets you earn in this League will transfer over to the next one.
textByHash.c8193a02201908b2af5273a1abdc9b2af57d94b0: Finally, on top of the tasks for this League, there are some other activities for which I will recognise the first person who completes them.
textByHash.f9b31746470da8e18165dac60acc9cf193b6a7ec: You can view the entire list of activities, as well as whether or not someone has completed them, by reading the board beside me.
textByHash.bdce8ba5ab88d7ecb208511feefe1ddd49030378: Not a problem. Now, is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.9c160676922af4c3b8df86bd52b1b6f83a34f1ee: Of course! If you're lucky enough to obtain a pet during a League, it will automatically be insured for you.
textByHash.c3f9caa2b65fc262864d208f66ae86348b10f81d: This means that if you were to ever lose it, you can talk to me and I'll give it back to you. Insurance and reclaiming is all free!
textByHash.e4fd24731f4542edb9b3ee5e510a9839e3e5d400: Additionally, each pet you obtain will be transferred to the next League. It'll be waiting with me for you to reclaim it!
textByHash.9ef7a1f60f4a7025a58323cd9bb0861b31a731b6: No worries. Come back to me once you have some pets and you can view your collection! Now, is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.83936d6ef986b65beeeabe502130abddec1abd29: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything about Leagues.
textByHash.a3b062cf9ed259bea5e50a4b85f9f963a98c9c8c: Hello there. Do you have any questions about Leagues?
textByHash.df91bc546a6304a8d0b58fcbe307dc7029221d6c: Leagues are time-limited challenges that provide a unique twist on the world you know and love.
textByHash.5688d23592d6a1b16f68dba48750244fad679308: With each League, you start afresh, with a limited amount of time to progress through the League.
textByHash.8fdd9fc5a399b5b9bdec852ef30d8fc228e2a310: Glory, gold, and the chance to do things in a different way!
textByHash.87bbb4be5368ce73f6d41b6ef06734412ff2f83b: First up, the glory. Within a League, you can earn League Points by completing various tasks.
textByHash.faf4d47d045f88f60b097f2995ae6a1d1237fde6: The more points you have at the end of the League, the better League Rank you will be given.
textByHash.911415bd8da5b742206877e345ee0db26de1e3ed: Each League Rank will unlock a trophy for you. These trophies can be used to show off your accomplishments.
textByHash.194714de530dfdd2e2c3d684faa94f75ccf30973: If that doesn't interest you, how about gold! League Points can be used to buy things from the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHash.c60683deb4504709753aa188d94bdbd973bf5de8: You can keep these purchases for yourself or sell them on to others!
textByHash.1b6e9f367858f6ad0f963d60acb32461ea06bc10: Every League has unique rules and features to set it aside from the world you're used to.
textByHash.6b6e73840d0d179b02f7b7e0a02c3c3d06430f9a: Not only that, but within this League, you can unlock powerful artefacts known as Fragments. Fragments completely change the way you progress through the League!
textByHash.150b987389e51deb6d355db55f1a44b0d49bc49c: So even if glory and gold are not for you, you'll still find Leagues to be a whole lot of fun!
textByHash.d5189bb83f0deafb192add9503932dcf6d797984: Well sadly you're not eligible to take part in a League right now. I'll be happy to help once you are though.
textByHash.abc152f60bd06bfc41679367d07188fa8ba1e3d6: Yes! The current League is Leagues III - Shattered Relics.
textByHash.eb251aedc8b5e180b9b0b86e0355e546b0eec996: Within this League you are restricted to three skills: Defence, Fishing and Thieving, you can unlock more skills by completing tasks to earn Sage's Renown.
textByHash.df891ad6f4798e74e120ab00b376d524d5be3087: Sage's Renown can be used to purchase access to Skills, Bosses and to Auto Complete Quests.
textByHash.2e3dc5f3c1fc37fb30e0d6ed5cd66761947663e8: You can also collect powerful artifacts known as Fragments, each Fragment provides a different buff so be sure to collect them all.
textByHash.4daf6c74e068a42cb7347dd10c6fed99cca08f33: You can level up these Fragments to make them even stronger, you can also bring together different Fragments to activate powerful buffs known as Set Effects.
textByHash.76d2407b6a9c80c701c269d8032fe3b80a20e6a3: I heard there's one that lets you swap between Magic spellbooks whenever you want!
textByHash.cedc908ca39ffb2545fb66a5453739ba07b12837: Not only that, but you must participate as an Iron Man. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.
textByHash.f0e5b33f0f182eda5f720acacf626e2bef8c3ac3: Certainly! I have a number of unique rewards which you might be interested in.
textByHash.1a380b9e78df8a26ee5044a09e0f367337275955: Of course! What would you like to know?
textByHash.9d380c0c98b5cc2fa4e03e8463bf6ec22d804dda: League Trophies are a representation of how well you did in a specific League. Performance is judged on the number of League Points you earned compared to everyone else who participated.
textByHash.a13ad53c0aa53141fddecf0f124db24c67d364b1: There are seven tiers of League Trophy: Bronze, Iron, Steel, Mithril, Adamant, Rune and Dragon.
textByHash.3b1f4dd6e368972f72cbab24851c75f479f5a531: You have not earned any League trophies. If you want a League trophy you should participate next time a League comes around!
textByHash.e770898d65f97b6cc46c81b84f94a5537bdc29ee: You do not have enough space for all the League Trophies available to you. Come back to me when you do.
textByHash.46a1b94c4e40fbce9a51f7d9d2121ef7906f0dd0: Ah! Looks like you have already claimed all of the League Trophies available to you.
textByHash.f39727aafa0c0736a43529296f49ff71395fa0a2: Which League do you want to know about?
textByHash.bd72cb349478022bb8647ae40ec3ab321c514eed: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 10 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 80 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 510 points.
textByHash.ea9c371f0fe6ebe6f65ee87d63b8a1a3290b855a: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 1,770 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 5,270 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 10,820 points.
textByHash.2e83daa0a46eaddab8ab03f8e5300b63ed3c9b9a: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 20,830 points.
textByHash.4d5cbf4502447ca5726de32d003d8ad7d2f20d6c: You earned 0 League points which does not qualify you for any trophy.
textByHash.d77ab7f6ff0a4fee58b04f4be6a407dd809da807: You earned League Points in Leagues I - Twisted. That makes you eligible for the Twisted Trophy and all Twisted Trophies under it!
textByHash.33a1aa1807f04188ce6bd65f5bb42230d16d63d0: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 100 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 510 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 2,000 points.
textByHash.31e0a9b47d2ce38b23ec1a1a6da92483fcc33c8e: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 6,480 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 18,720 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 35,680 points.
textByHash.deac9e4906705e9222b99739c3b4228060df7523: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 56,310 points.
textByHash.a3c5c3be27bbf3ea68651343778b255c4f041364: You earned League Points in Leagues II - Trailblazer. That makes you eligible for the Trailblazer Trophy and all Trailblazer Trophies under it!
textByHash.33f1bcf6cd947cf7779719a9f8f228d35d3e0287: There is currently no League running.
textByHash.7796d39d88009db32d69500fbb15676841ac23b0: Hello! Welcome to the Twisted League. I see you are new here.
textByHash.9f3191cf15e74fc9bd8ef223d17ce87baeb32ccb: First of all, I'm your Leagues Tutor. If you have any questions about how Leagues work, you can come to me for help.
textByHash.978d9b66c50f822499f19c2fd2503d1561918cd6: Now, Leagues are time-limited modes that give you a new way to play the game. For this League, you are restricted to the Kourend and Kebos regions, and you play as an Iron Man.
textByHash.1202f443319a23bd93797ebcb9e0230dfccb970e: Let's take a look at all of the information available about this League. There is a new section in the journal tab whilst on a Leagues world. Click on the flashing quest icon to take a look.
textByHash.eb944f48f1ae5c5b7a64354509470ef2178b65e4: Now that you have your journal open, click on the flashing Leagues icon.
textByHash.468cbd92e14e7d82d6d5459fa817ba93c9d6ad90: This is the Leagues menu. Here you can view your progress through the current League. You can also open the various Leagues interfaces from here.
textByHash.19fbfe1dea9528958696c107c468514e068545c6: Your objective in each League is to complete tasks and earn League Points.
textByHash.c0381551df73287cb72d665373dbd8fedc1d8158: Tasks are split into five difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite and Master. The harder the task, the more points awarded.
textByHash.6add5b82e5b31d69595a02d6d679b40825dd4809: Let's have a look at the tasks interface now. Click on the flashing button to open it.
textByHash.6c166db4e47f34a6efe5c9a345d32c2332050d1d: This is the tasks interface. Here you can see all the tasks available to you in this League. When you are ready to continue, close the interface by clicking on the cross in the corner of it.
textByHash.4724cae3d615c77b8a5fc8b57eef2b384b4e32ce: Earning points during the League will allow you to unlock powerful Twisted Relics. The more League Points you have, the more Relics available to you.
textByHash.1a793bd784f48cebcd22287ebff6b03c42689973: League Points are also transferred over to your main profile. There, they can be spent on rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHash.82eaea0ee17de6bd6753125017885a5a7a722cd9: Now let's have a look at the Twisted Relics. Click on the flashing button to take a look at the Relics interface.
textByHash.ba3cfbdefe53abbbea732761d2fbb9d2c51cef95: This is the Relics interface. Here you can unlock new Twisted Relics to be used during this League. When you are ready to continue, close the interface by clicking on the cross in the corner of it.
textByHash.21feba5fb4439b17547a948e44fe25c59f315af5: There are a few changes to Kourend and Kebos which you may not be used to. You can view all of these changes on the information interface.
textByHash.6185ed7efaf23f53adb76144cefd44ad2b7b84f4: Right, I think that's everything. If you need reminding of any of this information, you can either talk to me or read the information interface.
textByHash.26ca0fcd7b742949ee46b8f12e9a6b0bbdf78f7f: Before you head off though, it's time to pick your first Relic! Choose carefully though, once you've picked a Relic you can't go back and change your decision.
textByHash.c4fbda1d9ae0102d2edfabd1851184985c4fc0fe: I'm the Tutor for Old School Leagues.
textByHash.c7c1e81ce3d30d1e498e9072f3bcb6633f019ccf: Old School Leagues are time-limited game modes that are separate from your main profile.
textByHash.b16bf2c8a84e9acedcc8cf0f91ca195d959b8563: With each League, you start afresh, with a limited amount of time to progress through the game mode.
textByHash.4394f6f3f0f41e31976cbab1f4912cad27d4a85b: Glory, gold, and the chance to play the game in a different way!
textByHash.7b7e7f6d1f29d08bcf2ea52cb5d455608e5cd737: Each League Rank will unlock a trophy for you. These trophies can be used to show off how well you did.
textByHash.7f145b4aa1eaa8a4899ddb44da44421f3436dfdf: If that doesn't interest you, how about gold! When you earn League Points, they will be transferred over to your main profile.
textByHash.3995505de4ad8049558d3dbb8777a8f44c759e60: These points can be used to buy things from the Leagues Reward Shop. You can keep these purchases for yourself or sell them on to other players!
textByHash.43b5d9b12ae16fba3cf2dd5e95169d677f61895c: Leagues aren't just a copy of the normal game. Every League has unique rules and features to set it aside from the game you're used to.
textByHash.e03c853e41091ba1235c5ccaafdae0f0611dcc38: Not only that, but within each League, you can unlock powerful artefacts known as Relics. These Relics completely change the way you play the game!
textByHash.7c10637df9a4f12aef7aa24cb33cca30a74a6a47: No, The most recent League was the Twisted League. You can now claim your trophies from the Twisted League and purchase rewards using your League points.
textByHash.68fced8c29d0a8b675f463f095d79b95aff7346f: There are seven tiers of Trophy: Bronze, Iron, Steel, Mithril, Adamant, Rune and Dragon. Each League trophy has a logo on the front so you can tell which League it was awarded from.
textByHash.e0092cff9d4bed6be660bb55b7e6fc78f15d10d0: Bronze trophy: 10 points, Iron trophy: 80 points, Steel trophy: 510 points, Mithril trophy: 1770 points.
textByHash.bb87fcf0adefd0aa74d4faa113f088b09f1ec516: Adamant trophy: 5270 points, Rune trophy: 10820 points and the Dragon Trophy: 20830 points.
textByHash.25398433aeb68043c84bf67779c18b3ece3d2863: You earned League points which qualifies you for the all of the Twisted League trophies up to and including the Twisted trophy!
textByHash.6265dd6ccad0db18291e7af407a3776759bfef11: Certainly, I have a number of unique rewards which you can purchase using points earned competing in a League. Here is what is available.
textByHash.96254cd865cce56d67175afe057749aa4fc5d1db: Of course, here are the trophies you have earned.
textByHash.db3595e13d485a87a0ee9212201427244de750a7: You do not have enough space for all the League trophies you can claim. Come back to me when you have more space.
textByHash.6542d9c774cca157269e7b7e5417bf132aadc548: You have already claimed all of the League trophies which you have earned.
textByHash.937daaee9f9e8c04327600c8bc85c99fefad6fb1: Glory, rewards, and the chance to do things in a different way!
textByHash.5864425a98f064641324c0b3a46d020690b9052e: The more points you have, the better League Rank you will be given.
textByHash.d572193788e8a2a15022c2d17eddcbea373a76f8: If that doesn't interest you, perhaps another reward might be more appealing? League Points can be used to buy things from the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHash.82dfcf718b627968409b2d2503efcc5da5497871: Every League has unique rules and features. It's a very different world from the one you're used to.
textByHash.692a465f5068ffeaeed3bb069c5a80df3c99996a: For one thing, within the Leagues, you can unlock powerful artefacts known as Relics which completely change the way you progress.
textByHash.9fe4aa8f08d8b614cc17fa0b235357c1d852f947: So even if glory and rewards aren't your thing, you'll still find Leagues to be a whole lot of fun!
textByHash.790932a3319c292aa95810da78dda42788595668: League Trophies are a representation of how well you did in a specific League. Performance is judged on the number of League Points you earned.
textByHash.2f67d9d05de952e806e7d300da29750b4f5f1c2c: You earned 0 League Points in Leagues I: Twisted. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Twisted Trophies.
textByHash.bcb1acfbacee5ff6b106bdeab94d378d45d40c13: You earned 0 League Points in Leagues II: Trailblazer. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Trailblazer Trophies.
textByHash.ba63db51682e7d61852d18fc426cf64bdb8cc74e: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 100 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 480 points. The Steel Trophy cut-off is 1,660 points.
textByHash.a7af2bf2c72764481b63c222db6d2a2851504bea: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 5,475 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 15,575 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 31,980 points.
textByHash.0bf6975f39ac9ec433c999a9fc4d47e172faf2ee: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 52,545 points.
textByHash.9d50f1bbaa6ef84f48df25e17858e4ba44114b19: You earned 0 League Points in Leagues III: Shattered Relics. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Shattered Relics Trophies.
textByHash.9a9a83640b3279b5042646027692089e85f479d7: You earned League Points in Leagues III: Shattered Relics. That makes you eligible for the Shattered Relics Trophy and all Shattered Relics Trophies under it!
textByHash.bcf209c824a4a1d040a19674c2c97ec4a7fe03e6: The Bronze Trophy cut-off is 2,500 points. The Iron Trophy cut-off is 5,000 points. The Steel Trophy cut- off is 10,000 points.
textByHash.4ed108681b0fd9fb28130c41c1e455d19bb62172: The Mithril Trophy cut-off is 18,000 points. The Adamant Trophy cut-off is 28,000 points. The Rune Trophy cut-off is 42,000 points.
textByHash.345d7cfc8455449a5a74252a6690ea53f3ea21ce: Finally, the Dragon Trophy cut-off is 56,000 points.
textByHash.cac898094fe14dd19585908ec193dd668ac0c617: You earned 0 League Points in Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded. Sadly, that means you are not eligible for any Trailblazer Reloaded Trophies.
textByHash.e1bf494c5a6b10962d46973cab1d26448b7db8c2: You earned League Points in Leagues IV: Trailblazer Reloaded. That makes you eligible for the Trailblazer Reloaded Trophy and all Trailblazer Reloaded Trophies under it!
textByHash.b93efd08b1619e90a08043b332239b863d2117cf: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything more.
textByHash.cff0a72f6cfc36a7e1c1b3b4daa13fbb8aca0898: Well sadly, only Members are eligible to take part in Leagues. I'll be happy to help once you become one.
textByHash.10d975554f4dd7ef288cd96d3deb26ea8aac1667: Unfortunately I'm unable to trade with non-members. I'll be happy to help once you are one.
textByHash.bd8d59519ca2da58d7daadf30f69334bdfc13a6d: Yes! The current League is Leagues V: Raging Echoes.
textByHash.26f3704d7665f883dd6ca6bfce36f618112d05d3: This League features powerful boss variants in each region, and Combat Masteries to enhance your chosen combat style's strengths.
textByHash.8ce041293396e2d1ac2909bdeb7d34eb8cd5f0b5: As usual, you are restricted to certain regions around Gielinor - although you'll get to choose which ones.
textByHash.74f93cebbac572393bc3855776b59c76c84a62a2: You can also collect powerful artifacts known as Relics. Each one provides a different buff to your League experience.
textByHash.5c4838320de62ac727838fa8bf94be06ad1c37d2: There's one that lets you keep a kingdom in your pocket, and one that lets you become a Slayer Master!
textByHash.4cf15f0358dfbfcf5eba110bf7ed39b3cc69062f: One other thing. You must participate as an Ironman. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.
